query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality within 50 metres of 200-year storm-surge areas, sorted by shortest distance first, and report both municipality and county.

1.description: Fetch Kristiansand municipality boundary and names

2.description: Fetch 200-year storm-surge areas intersecting Kristiansand municipality

4.description: Filter buildings within 50 metres of storm-surge areas

5.description: Calculate distance from each building to nearest storm-surge area

6.description: Join municipality and county names to building results

7.description: Sort buildings by distance to storm-surge areas (ascending)

executions.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer,
    kommunenavn,
    fylkesnummer,
    fylkesnavn,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

SELECT
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    stormflohavniva_03618ac2d6ba4ba0ae13e7ead6caf572.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE
    ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(:kristiansand_geom), 4326), 25833));

SELECT
    byggid,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE
    ST_Intersects(representasjonspunkt, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(:kristiansand_geom), 4326), 25833));

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT
    kommunenummer,
    kommunenavn,
    fylkesnummer,
    fylkesnavn,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    stormflohavniva_03618ac2d6ba4ba0ae13e7ead6caf572.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE
    ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(:kristiansand_geom), 4326), 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [bygning]
SELECT
    byggid,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE
    ST_Intersects(representasjonspunkt, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(:kristiansand_geom), 4326), 25833));
